title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Compare the two photographs and answer the question. You have about one minute.

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the human impact of armed conflict might be and what role peacekeeping forces play.

images.label: A
images.description: UN peacekeeping soldiers in blue helmets distributing aid to civilians in a conflict-affected town, children watching cautiously from a distance

images.label: B
images.description: Journalists and camera crews filming destruction in a war-torn city, ruined buildings and rubble filling the background

followUp.question: Do you think international peacekeeping missions are generally effective? What factors influence their success or failure?

tasks.instructions: Compare the two photographs and say what the role of diplomacy is in resolving conflicts and building international cooperation.

images.label: D
images.description: World leaders seated around a large oval table at an international summit, interpreters in booths behind glass panels translating the discussions

images.label: E
images.description: Two ambassadors shaking hands at a formal treaty-signing ceremony, surrounded by officials and journalists in a grand diplomatic chamber

followUp.question: Do you think diplomacy and negotiation can ultimately resolve any conflict, or are some disputes beyond peaceful resolution?
